product.name: Iwell Storage Cabinet with 2 Shelves, Rattan Cabinet with 2 Doors, Sideboard Buffet Cabinets with Storage for Living Room, Dining Room, Entryway, Natural
features: ⭐【Ample Storage Space】Measuring 11.8"D*27.5"W*31.4"H, deeper than ordinary storage cabinets, which is the great option to store kitchen appliances such as microwave, oven, coffee maker. Adjustable shelf maximize ample storage space, making high bottle storage a non-issue!

⭐【Functions Can Be More】This rattan storage cabinet can not only serve as a buffet cabinet to store your dinnerware, glassware and wine glasses ; a TV cabinet(2 cabinets suit for 70’’TV ); an entryway cabinet to store shoe, bags and gloves; etc. Believing it can be a nice choice.

⭐【Sturdy & Durable Construction】Premium engineered wood with thickened solid wood legs makes the storage cabinet more sturdy and stable to withstand long-term use. 4 thickened, slightly angled legs are more supportive(Weight Capacity: 150lb). Just wipe it with a damp cloth to keep it clean and looking its best!

⭐【Assembly You’ll Love】The instruction is very detailed and easy to read, and even inexperienced people can quickly complete the installation. it only takes about 30 minutes, you can get a practical storage cabinet.

⭐【100% Satisfaction Service】We have destroyed the old stock and have tightly controlled the production process to ensure that there will be no more height inconsistencies. If you have any dissatisfaction about the cabinet you received, please click “contact seller”, we will send new or refund without returns within 24 hours.
